---
draft: false
title: Shannon Pileggi
subtitle: Associate Director, Data Science
date: '2026-03-17'
about:
  template: marquee
  image: featured.png
  links:
  - icon: link
    text: Piping Hot Data
    href: https://www.pipinghotdata.com/
  - icon: video
    text: Package Management
    href: ../recordings/package_management
  - icon: linkedin
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shannon-m-pileggi/
  - icon: bluesky
    href: https://bsky.app/profile/pipinghotdata.com
  - icon: mastodon
    href: https://fosstodon.org/@PipingHotData
  - icon: github
    href: https://github.com/shannonpileggi
  - icon: cv
    href: https://www.pipinghotdata.com/shannon_pileggi_cv
---

 Shannon Pileggi (she/her) is an Associate Directory of Data Science at The Prostate Cancer Clinical Trials Consortium, an occasional blogger, a frequent workshop instructor, and a member of the R-Ladies Leadership team. She enjoys automating data wrangling and data outputs, and making both data insights and learning new material digestible.
